Doesnt exist. There are powerhouses in the game. Situations where one comp is favored over another.

How do you actually "build" a team? Im pretty early on in the game (Act 4), but lets say, i like Jenkins as my main dps. Ive tried to go with Red Purple, to maximize Ult spam with babies, as well as have easy vuln access. Im pretty sure i should be scaling crit damage as well, but i dont think i have anyone that reliable scales that right now.
The idea is there. It’s all about working around one damage source (archetype/mechanic/realm/Awakener). Then you build other Awakeners and WoDs that play around it.
What about defensive characters? If im building around a hypercarry, should i still include one or would just trying to burst as fast as possible be more reliable?
Are we talking about defensive characters or offensive?
This statement asked about defensives then talked about offensives…
using an Aggressive Hypercarry, should i include someone that allows me to stay alive in the team as a support, or just use 3 characters as supports that try to help me burst as fast as possible
idk if that makes sense
It depends on each state and level and diffuculty
Sometimes you want to burst the enemy as fast as possible. Sometimes its necessary to have 2 Awakeners be survival Awakeners so you live UNTIL your burst turn
alright makes sense thanks a lot
